name: silent-region trimming for beat_this

vocadito_beat_f_ge_0.95_on_silent_clips.note: Vocadito has no clips with > 1 s leading/trailing silence; criterion is vacuous on this corpus

mv2h_ge_baseline_plus_0.01.observed: MV2H surrogate +0.014 in 10-clip subset but strict noff F1 -0.0065 — surrogate metric overstates the lift

discard_rationale: G-6 cannot demonstrate its target Vocadito beat F-measure ≥ 0.95 on > 1 s silent clips because no such clips exist in Vocadito. Combined with G-4 + G-5 the production default-on path regressed noff F1 by 0.0065, so the safer choice is default-off. Pipeline routes audio correctly (trims only the audio fed to beat_this); the bug surfaced only in the inline gate path which is now fixed.
